_comment: StackChan presence watcher config. Hot-reloaded on file mtime change.

frame_diff._notes: Threshold raised from 14 -> 28 on 2026-06-13 evening after idle-motion-induced ghost greetings. The camera is mounted on the head, and stackchan-idle-motion.service does slow sway + pitch-breath + occasional twitch, which shift the camera POV between captures and look like 14-18 delta room motion. 28 should skip past idle-induced deltas; a real human walking in will generate much higher delta. Proper fix is coordination (idle-motion publishes 'I just moved' timestamps, frame-diff skips post-move settle window).

mic_vad._notes: DISABLED 2026-06-13 16:46: faster-whisper hallucinates *full sentences* on ambient room audio (TV, music, other voices) that pass the denylist and fire fake presence events. Re-enable only when we add a real VAD layer or two-consecutive-poll confirmation. Frame_diff + BLE are doing the work fine without it.

ble._notes: Add MACs once observed via 'presence_watcher.py --scan'. RSSI >= threshold means 'in the room'. Higher (less negative) = closer.

wifi._notes: Added 2026-07-15 (night build). Identity signal, not occupancy: phone on LAN = person is HOME; camera says IN OFFICE; fusion enriches anonymous motion with the name. MAC is the per-SSID persistent randomized MAC on bradfordsecnet; if Christopher resets network settings or the SSID changes, re-discover with ARP sweep. miss_tolerance 6 x 20s = 2min grace for phone deep-sleep ping drops.

fusion._notes: occupancy_edge: track ABSENT/PRESENT state; only greet on the leading edge of ABSENT->PRESENT. Once PRESENT, repeated signals just refresh occupancy. State drops back to ABSENT after `absence_seconds_before_reset` of no signal (default 5 min). `greeting_cooldown_seconds` is a hard floor between greetings even if you walked in/out fast (default 15 min). 'confirmed_presence_requires': 'any'=single signal, 'two_of_three'=two signal types within 30s before declaring presence.

on_presence.telegram_template: 👀 Presence detected in the office ({signal}). Identity check: {identity}
on_presence._notes: Telegram notify is the silent witness; the body greeting below is the actual show.

body_greeting._notes: Choreography: blink on → LED fade-in + opening_face (surprised, 0.5s) → main face (happy) + say → soft 4-point nod → LED fade-out → idle. Hot-reloads on config save. To mute, set enabled=false.
